items.title: European Smart Home Market to Reach USD 29.24 Billion by 2029 Amidst Safety and Convenience Concerns
items.description: The European smart home market, valued at USD 22.11 billion in 2024, is set to reach USD 29.24 billion by 2029, growing at a 5.7% CAGR. Safety, security, and convenience concerns among consumers are the main growth drivers, while high switching costs for current devices present a challenge. Key segments such as lighting control and behavioral systems are projected to see significant growth. Germany's market is poised for rapid growth, supported by government initiatives like the Next Generation
